features.title: Hook integration for auto event logging
features.description: Add PostToolUse hooks on Agent tool (agent_spawned) and Bash tool with state-mutate matcher (phase_changed) that call log-event to append to events.jsonl automatically.
steps: Verify hooks.json contains a PostToolUse hook on Agent tool that calls log-event --type agent_spawned
Verify hooks.json contains a PostToolUse hook on Bash tool with matcher for state-mutate --set-phase that calls log-event --type phase_changed
Simulate agent spawn event and confirm events.jsonl contains agent_spawned entry with timestamp
Simulate phase transition via state-mutate --set-phase and confirm events.jsonl contains phase_changed entry with timestamp
Verify both hooks use the existing events.mjs logEvent() module
features.notes: Sprint 1 group with F-021 and F-022. Shares hooks.json surface with F-021.

features.title: Enforce progress-append via hooks
features.description: Refine the existing PostToolUse Bash hook (post:bash:harness-progress-update) to fire specifically after evaluation-related auto-commit calls rather than after every Bash invocation. Update coordinator.md to document hook-automated progress-append.
steps: Verify hooks.json post:bash:harness-progress-update hook has a matcher targeting auto-commit with --status pass or --status fail patterns
Verify the hook does NOT fire on arbitrary Bash invocations (matcher is specific)
Verify coordinator.md documents that progress-append is hook-automated after evaluation
Verify coordinator.md no longer instructs manual progress-append after evaluation commits
features.notes: Sprint 1 group with F-020 and F-022. Refines existing hook rather than adding new one.

features.title: Round numbering verification subcommand
features.description: Add verify-round-numbering subcommand to harness-companion.mjs that reads .harness/sprints/ directory, parses NN prefixes, cross-references against state.json cost_tracking, and reports mismatches as structured JSON.
steps: Verify verify-round-numbering subcommand is registered in harness-companion.mjs SUBCOMMANDS map
Run verify-round-numbering and verify JSON output contains { ok: boolean, mismatches: [] }
Verify it reads .harness/sprints/ directory and parses NN prefix from filenames
Verify it cross-references sprint file round numbers against state.json cost_tracking round entries
Verify clean pass when no mismatches exist
Verify accurate mismatch detection when sprint files have wrong NN prefix
features.notes: Sprint 1 group with F-020 and F-021. Independent verification subcommand.

features.title: Standardize codex CLI review approach
features.description: Update evaluator.md and advanced.md to make codex review --commit HEAD the primary invocation method and move /codex:adversarial-review --wait to fallback position. Both files must consistently document CLI primary, skill invocation as fallback.
steps: Read evaluator.md section '0. Code Review Pre-Flight' and verify codex review --commit HEAD is listed as primary method
Verify /codex:adversarial-review --wait is listed as fallback in evaluator.md
Read advanced.md 'Codex Detection Detailed Procedure' section and verify CLI is listed before skill invocation
Verify both files consistently document the same ordering: CLI primary, skill fallback
Verify no contradictory ordering exists in either file
features.notes: Sprint 2 group with F-024. Documentation-only change.

features.title: Add finalize-round subcommand
features.description: New finalize-round --round N subcommand in harness-companion.mjs that fills empty cost_tracking timestamps with current ISO time, reads NN-evaluation.json for decision/outcome, falls back to --outcome flag. Update coordinator.md to call finalize-round at end of each round.
steps: Verify finalize-round subcommand is registered in harness-companion.mjs SUBCOMMANDS map
Run finalize-round --round N and verify empty timestamps in cost_tracking.rounds[N] are populated with ISO timestamps
Verify it reads .harness/sprints/NN-evaluation.json to extract decision field and sets outcome accordingly
Verify --outcome flag works as fallback when evaluation.json is missing
Verify coordinator.md includes finalize-round --round N in the round-end procedure
Verify atomic write pattern via writeState()
features.notes: Sprint 2 group with F-023. New subcommand plus coordinator.md update.
